summary: PR inventory shard classified conservatively. No shared canonical was invented; all listed PRs remain open, non-security-sensitive, and independent review items. No close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: Distinct maintainer-owned fix with proof and passing relevant checks; no duplicate or superseding canonical is hydrated in this inventory shard.
Feature/config PR is not a duplicate candidate and draft/merge-risk state makes closure or merge inappropriate in this plan.
Distinct Telegram recovery PR with its own proof/review path; no hydrated duplicate or superseding PR is established.
Clear standalone approval-wait fix; no close-style action is justified without a shared canonical or superseding hydrated item.
Independent Codex app-server fix with passing proof; no duplicate/superseded relation is established in this shard.
Large independent performance/config PR requiring normal maintainer review; no security routing or close action is supported by the hydrated artifact.
Broad draft maintainer feature PR remains an independent work item; not eligible for close/merge planning in this inventory shard.
Small standalone fix but proof is failing/insufficient; keep as independent rather than closing or marking fixed-by-candidate.
Recent focused maintainer-adjacent fix is independent; merge is blocked by job frontmatter and no close action applies.
Distinct agent error-surfacing PR; no duplicate/superseded relationship or low-signal close permission is present.
Broad independent UI/gateway PR with failing checks; keep open for normal review rather than route security or close.
Very broad independent feature PR with dependency and build failures; no low-signal close is allowed by the job permissions.
Focused draft maintainer PR is an independent fix path; no closure or security routing is supported.
Maintainer draft remains a distinct exec-adjacent bugfix; artifact does not mark it security-sensitive and no duplicate canonical exists.
Independent prompt-cache PR with broad touched surface and waiting-on-author state; no close-style or merge action is appropriate.
Distinct maintainer Windows/gateway repair PR; draft status and no shared canonical mean keep independent.
